meaning: v.装玻璃,上釉,使表面光滑n.釉料,釉面,光滑面,上釉,上光
examples: Furthermore, the designs were covered with "desert varnish", a glaze that develops on rock surfaces over thousands of years of exposure to the elements.
Several salads have either cilantro lime glaze, or orange glaze added.
At the end of their ladies' lunch, they were served a tart with a gorgeous, glossy glaze.
The rich fruit flavor from the beer also pairs nicely with the glaze on the squab.
It's basically a pound cake with a spider web on top of the glaze.
